name: Validation Evidence Gate
purpose: Coordinate automated, semantic, and manual validation evidence before lifecycle completion.

roles.label: Test Planning
acceptance_criteria: Maps every material claim to an automated command, evidence artifact, or manual gate.

roles.label: Local Validation
acceptance_criteria: Records exact commands, current target revision, pass/fail result, and artifacts.

roles.label: Deployed Validation
acceptance_criteria: Separates hosted/deployed evidence from local-only evidence and names environment limits.

roles.label: Validation Rollup
acceptance_criteria: Summarizes what is proven, what is waived, and what remains unverified.
